name: Cloud App File Activity Summary
description: Summarize file modifications, deletions, and uploads per user and application from CloudAppEvents.
query:
CloudAppEvents
| search ""
| where ActionType in ("FileModified", "FileDeleted", "FileUploaded")
| extend
    UpdatedFiles = iff(ActionType == "FileModified", ObjectName, ""),
    DeletedFiles = iff(ActionType == "FileDeleted", ObjectName, ""),
    CreatedFiles = iff(ActionType == "FileUploaded", ObjectName, "")
| summarize
    UpdatedCount = countif(ActionType == "FileModified"),
    DeletedCount = countif(ActionType == "FileDeleted"),
    CreatedCount = countif(ActionType == "FileUploaded"),
    UniqueFiles = dcount(ObjectId),
    UpdatedFilesList = make_set_if(UpdatedFiles, isnotempty(UpdatedFiles)),
    DeletedFilesList = make_set_if(DeletedFiles, isnotempty(DeletedFiles)),
    CreatedFilesList = make_set_if(CreatedFiles, isnotempty(CreatedFiles))
    by AccountDisplayName, Application
| where UpdatedCount > 0 or DeletedCount > 0 or CreatedCount > 0
| extend TotalActions = UpdatedCount + DeletedCount + CreatedCount
| project-reorder
    AccountDisplayName,
    Application,
    TotalActions,
    UpdatedCount,
    UpdatedFilesList,
    DeletedCount,
    DeletedFilesList,
    CreatedCount,
    CreatedFilesList,
    UniqueFiles
| sort by TotalActions desc

name: Email Subject Hunting with URL Clicks
description: Search emails by subject keyword and correlate with URL click events per recipient.
query:
let SubjectKeyword = ""; // <= FILTER
EmailEvents
| where Subject contains SubjectKeyword
| project EmailTimestamp = Timestamp, Subject, SenderFromAddress, RecipientEmailAddress, NetworkMessageId
| join kind=leftouter (
    EmailUrlInfo
    | project NetworkMessageId, Url, UrlLocation
) on NetworkMessageId
| join kind=leftouter (
    UrlClickEvents
    | project NetworkMessageId, ClickTimestamp = Timestamp, ClickedUrl = Url, IPAddress, ActionType, IsClickedThrough
) on NetworkMessageId
| summarize
    EmailCount = count(),
    Subjects = make_set(Subject),
    Senders = make_set(SenderFromAddress),
    UrlList = make_set(Url),
    ClickedUrls = make_set(ClickedUrl),
    IPAddresses = make_set(IPAddress),
    LastEmailTimestamp = max(EmailTimestamp),
    LastClickTimestamp = max(ClickTimestamp)
by RecipientEmailAddress
| project
    LastEmailTimestamp,
    LastClickTimestamp,
    RecipientEmailAddress,
    EmailCount,
    Subjects,
    Senders,
    UrlList,
    ClickedUrls,
    IPAddresses

name: LOLBin Execution by Device
description: Hunt for living-off-the-land binary executions on a specific device over the last 7 days.
query:
let deviceFilter = ""; // <= FILTER
let lolbins = dynamic([
    "at.exe", "bitsadmin.exe", "certutil.exe", "cmd.exe", "cmstp.exe", "cscript.exe",
    "mshta.exe", "powershell.exe", "regsvr32.exe", "rundll32.exe", "sc.exe", "wmic.exe",
    "wscript.exe", "msiexec.exe", "forfiles.exe", "schtasks.exe", "regsvcs.exe", "regasm.exe",
    "odbcconf.exe", "installutil.exe", "pcalua.exe", "csc.exe", "vbc.exe", "powershell.exe", "advanced_ip_scanner.exe"
]);
DeviceProcessEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where DeviceName == deviceFilter
| where FileName in~ (lolbins)
| project-reorder
    TimeGenerated,
    DeviceName,
    DeviceId,
    FileName,
    ProcessCommandLine,
    InitiatingProcessFileName,
    InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
    AccountName,
    AccountDomain,
    ProcessId,
    FolderPath,
    FileSize,
    SHA1,
    SHA256,
    MD5,
    ProcessVersionInfoCompanyName,
    ProcessVersionInfoProductName,
    ProcessVersionInfoProductVersion,
    ProcessIntegrityLevel,
    ProcessTokenElevation

name: Identity Failed Logon Summary
description: Summarize failed logon events from IdentityLogonEvents with source/destination device details.
query:
IdentityLogonEvents
| where LogonType contains "Failed logon"
| where AccountName has_any ("")
| where DestinationDeviceName has_any ("")
| extend AdditionalFields_FROM_DEVICE = parse_json(AdditionalFields)["FROM.DEVICE"]
| extend AdditionalFields_TO_DEVICE = parse_json(AdditionalFields)["TO.DEVICE"]
| summarize
    TotalFailures = count(),
    DistinctTargets = dcount(AccountName),
    FailureCodes = make_set(ActionType),
    LastAttempt = max(Timestamp),
    AdditionalFields_FROM_DEVICE = make_set(AdditionalFields_FROM_DEVICE),
    AdditionalFields_TO_DEVICE = make_set(AdditionalFields_TO_DEVICE)
    by AccountName, FailureReason, LogonType, DestinationDeviceName
| project
    ResponsibleAccount = AccountName,
    LogonType,
    TotalFailures,
    DestinationDeviceName,
    DistinctTargets,
    FailureCodes,
    FailureReason,
    LastAttempt,
    AdditionalFields_FROM_DEVICE,
    AdditionalFields_TO_DEVICE

name: 4688 Hunting via WindowsEvent
description: Extract process creation details from the WindowsEvent table (Event ID 4688).
query:
WindowsEvent
| search ""
| summarize
  NewProcessName = make_set(EventData.NewProcessName),
  ParentProcessName = make_set(EventData.ParentProcessName),
  LogonID = make_set(EventData.TargetLogonId),
  first_time = min(TimeGenerated),
  last_time = max(TimeGenerated),
  event_count=count()
by Computer, CommandLine = tostring(EventData.CommandLine), Caller_User_Name = tostring(EventData.TargetUserName)

name: 4688 Hunting via SecurityEvent
description: Extract process creation details from the SecurityEvent table (Event ID 4688).
query:
SecurityEvent
| where EventID == 4688
| search ""
| extend Caller_User_Name = tostring(TargetUserName)
| extend LogonID = tostring(TargetLogonId)
| summarize
    NewProcessNames = make_set(NewProcessName),
    ParentProcessNames = make_set(ParentProcessName),
    LogonIDs = make_set(LogonID),
    first_time = min(TimeGenerated),
    last_time = max(TimeGenerated),
    event_count = count()
    by Computer, CommandLine, Caller_User_Name
| project first_time, last_time, Computer, Caller_User_Name, ParentProcessNames, NewProcessNames, CommandLine, event_count

name: 4688 Hunting via MDE Tables
description: Union all MDE Device tables (DeviceEvents, DeviceProcessEvents, DeviceNetworkEvents, DeviceFileEvents, DeviceRegistryEvents, DeviceLogonEvents, DeviceImageLoadEvents) for broad hunting.
query:
union DeviceEvents, DeviceProcessEvents, DeviceNetworkEvents, DeviceFileEvents, DeviceRegistryEvents, DeviceLogonEvents, DeviceImageLoadEvents
| search ""
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| sort by TimeGenerated desc

name: Sign-in Logs with Threat Intel & Device Posture
description: Correlate interactive and non-interactive sign-ins with threat intelligence, device posture, and VirusTotal links.
query:
let logTypeFilter = "All"; // "All", "Interactive", or "Non-Interactive"
let searchKeyword = ""; // <= FILTER
let endpointFilter = ""; // <= FILTER by device name
let timeRange = 14d;
let ThreatData = ThreatIntelIndicators
| where isnotempty(ObservableValue)
| extend NetworkIP = ObservableValue
| extend Description = coalesce(tostring(Data.description), Tags, "Threat Indicator")
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, Description, Confidence) by NetworkIP;
let interactive = SigninLogs
| where logTypeFilter in ("All", "Interactive")
| where TimeGenerated > ago(timeRange)
| search searchKeyword
| extend DeviceName = tostring(DeviceDetail.displayName),
         Browser = tostring(DeviceDetail.browser),
         OS = tostring(DeviceDetail.operatingSystem),
         IsManaged = tostring(DeviceDetail.isManaged),
         AuthRequirement = tostring(AuthenticationRequirement),
         AuthDetails = tostring(AuthenticationDetails),
         City = tostring(parse_json(LocationDetails).city),
         Country = tostring(parse_json(LocationDetails).countryOrRegion)
| extend SignInType = "Interactive";
let nonInteractive = AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs
| where logTypeFilter in ("All", "Non-Interactive")
| where TimeGenerated > ago(timeRange)
| search searchKeyword
| extend DeviceName = "N/A", Browser = "N/A", OS = "N/A", IsManaged = "N/A",
         AuthRequirement = tostring(AuthenticationRequirement),
         AuthDetails = tostring(AuthenticationDetails),
         City = tostring(parse_json(LocationDetails).city),
         Country = tostring(parse_json(LocationDetails).countryOrRegion)
| extend SignInType = "Non-Interactive";
union interactive, nonInteractive
| where isnotempty(AppDisplayName)
| lookup kind=leftouter ThreatData on $left.IPAddress == $right.NetworkIP
| extend
    IPReputation = iff(isempty(Description), "Clean/Unknown", Description),
    VirusTotalLink = strcat("https://www.virustotal.com/gui/ip-address/", IPAddress)
| extend DevicePosture = case(
    SignInType == "Non-Interactive", "Background Process",
    IsManaged =~ "true", "Managed Device",
    IsManaged =~ "false", "Unmanaged",
    isempty(IsManaged) or IsManaged == "", "No Device Info",
    "Unknown"
)
| where isempty(endpointFilter) or DeviceName contains endpointFilter
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    UserPrincipalName,
    SignInType,
    DevicePosture,
    DeviceName,
    AuthRequirement,
    AuthDetails,
    ResultType,
    ResultDescription,
    AppDisplayName,
    IPAddress,
    City,
    Country,
    UserAgent,
    VirusTotalLink,
    IPReputation,
    OS,
    Browser
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
